description: This file defines a Flutter widget named HomeShell that manages navigation between different screens in a recipe application. It dynamically switches between a NavigationRail layout for wide screens and a bottom navigation bar for smaller screens, providing user interface navigation logic.

classes.name: HomeShell
classes.description: A StatefulWidget serving as the main container for navigating among different recipe-related screens.

classes.name: _HomeShellState
classes.description: State class managing the current selected index and rendering the appropriate layout based on screen width.

classes.name: _NavItem
classes.description: A helper class representing each navigation item with label, icon, and associated page widget.

methods.name: createState
methods.description: Creates the mutable state for HomeShell.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree, adapting layout for wide or narrow screens, incorporating navigation and main content.
